{{Quote|They have a charter which recognizes the ambiguities of war and politics, and inherit the jobs which require working outside the rules of polite society.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] on Alpha Blue|<ref name="storm" />}}
'''Alpha Blue''' was a clandestine division within the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]. Publicly, the unit did not exist and possessed no name. Alpha Blue was designed to perform secret intelligence and special operations, and to keep track of various potential threats while bypassing the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].

==Overview==
While the organization was known as Alpha Blue, publicly it possessed no name. Initially, it was known only to a dozen officials who possessed the very highest clearances. Furthermore, a veil of secrecy covered the body which meant that it did not appear in any government or military data records. This body also did not possess any identification cards and no insignia while performing their duties. They made use of special datacards when possessing information of a sensitive nature. These datacards contained a non-standard encoding which made the cards appear blank when used by a normal datapad. The special datacards were even capable of being erased and reformatted without destroying the special information contained within them.

Within the agency was a research division known as [[Alpha Red]]. The head of the organization took the position of [[Director/Legends|Director]]. The body also made use of special [[Alpha Blue analysis droid|analysis]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that were tasked with the study of intelligence data.

==History==
Alpha Blue had its roots in Shadow Operations, a group of operatives overseen by [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] formed after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Shadow Operations performed sabotage, spread disinformation, and where necessary conducted assassinations to exacerbate the tensions between the feuding Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]], [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admirals]] and [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Advisors]] that had erupted after [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] death. During the New Republic's [[Galactic Civil War/Legends#The advance of the New Republic (4-6 ABY)|liberation campaign]] from [[4 ABY/Legends|4]] to [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Shadow Operations greatly eased the New Republic's advance to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by preventing an Imperial reunification.<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

After witnessing, during the [[Palpatine/Legends|reborn Emperor's]] campaign, how the New Republic's growing bureaucracy could prevent necessary actions during times of extreme crisis, [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] [[D9020616|ordered the creation]] of Alpha Blue to perform secret intelligence and special operations missions while avoiding the slow moving committees and ministries of government. Shadow Operations formed the core of this new agency, and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]] was placed at the head of the organization and granted wide operational control. Few outside the highest echelons of the New Republic knew of Alpha Blue's existence, and even fewer knew the specifics of its work. The agency kept track of various potential threats and power-wielders, looking beyond the work of New Republic Intelligence to defuse threats before they developed.

Before the onset of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Admiral Drayson enlisted the aid of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] after Alpha Blue discovered a number of sightings of the mysterious ghostship known as the [[Teljkon Vagabond]]. After briefing him, Drayson dispatched the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] to further investigate the find. Alpha Blue was deeply involved in the secret analysis of the first meeting between [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nil Spaar]] of the [[Duskhan League]] and Chief of State [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. They later played a key role in gathering intelligence on the [[Yevetha]] as well as their [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]] of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].

Shortly before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Drayson retired from his post and handed the reins to [[Jan Ors]]. During the war, Alpha Blue worked with New Republic Intelligence, [[Lurrian]] genetic engineers and [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] scientists to develop [[Alpha Red (pathogen)|Alpha Red]].
